en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid AEAT Tax Compliance Certificate in the Spain Fiscal Compliance AEAT Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
\nThe Certificate must be issued within 30 days of submission.
Please upload your AEAT Tax Compliance Certificate, issued by the Spanish Tax Agency (AEAT).
Please enter the issue date of your AEAT Tax Compliance Certificate.
This should be 90 days after the issue date.
Please enter the expiration date of your AEAT Tax Compliance Certificate.
As an authorized signatory, I confirm that Tax Contributions are up-to-date and records are available upon request.
